overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a sunlit historic city with stone architecture, passing camels and pedestrians, and approaching a monumental gate with a sphinx statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered marketplace walkway with fabric awning

events.description: camel rider passes by on the right, temporarily blocking view of the plaza ahead
exits the covered walkway into the open sunlit plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone pathway under a fabric canopy, approaching an open plaza area

notable_agents.action: camel rider moving from center to right, passing by the ego character

entered.detail: building with red painted lower walls and stone upper facade
wooden wagon wheel and cart structure against the building
black fabric awning stretched across the street providing shade
low stone wall with built-in planters containing greenery
multi-level stone structure with wooden balcony on upper floor
mature tree with dense green canopy
large stone building with multiple archways visible in the distance
wooden lattice structure covered with climbing plants and red flowers
two-story structure with wooden balcony railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow covered pathway beneath a fabric canopy, passing a red plaster building on the left and a stone planter wall on the right. A camel rider passes by on the right side as the character approaches the exit of the covered walkway into a bright open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open civic plaza with triumphal arch and column monument

events.description: pedestrian in green tunic joins from the left, walking alongside ego
camel rider crosses the path from left to right in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing by a tall stone column monument and approaching a large gate structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking parallel to ego toward the plaza center
camel rider crossing the plaza from left to right

entered.detail: building with white dome roof visible behind trees
tall stone column with capital, standing in the plaza center
stone structure with three large archways on the ground floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the wide open plaza, the character walks past a domed building on the left and a multi-arch structure on the right. A pedestrian in a green tunic walks alongside, while a tall stone column monument rises in the center of the plaza ahead. A camel rider crosses the path from left to right.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach to city gate with market stalls

events.description: passing the tall stone column monument on the left side
approaching the large stone gate structure with dual arches

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza toward the large stone gate, passing market stalls on the left

notable_agents.action: camel rider passing by in front of the gate structure

entered.detail: massive stone gate structure with two large archways and defensive towers
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the right side of the approach
wooden stalls with red fabric awnings selling goods
decorative stone wall with integrated planters and greenery
large stone sphinx statue positioned near the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the stone column monument on the left and approaches the imposing large stone gate ahead. Market stalls with red awnings line the left side of the path, while cypress trees and stone planters decorate the right. A camel rider passes in front of the gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental stone gate passage with sphinx statue

events.description: entering the shaded gate passage with the sphinx statue visible on the right
moving from bright sunlight into the shadowed interior of the gate structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive stone gate arches, passing a large sphinx statue on the right

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian visible walking through the far archway

entered.detail: massive stone archway forming the entrance tunnel of the gate
tall stone obelisk visible through the gate in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the massive stone gate structure, walking beneath the high arches. The large sphinx statue stands prominently on the right side of the passage. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowed interior as the character proceeds toward the distant obelisk visible through the far archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, shaded walkway into a sprawling sunlit plaza and finally through a monumental stone gateway. It begins beneath a fabric canopy, passing a red plaster building and a camel rider before emerging from the covered path into the brilliance of a wide open plaza. As the character moves forward, the scene expands to reveal domed buildings and a central stone column monument, with pedestrians and camels crossing the bright expanse. The path then narrows again as the camera passes red-awninged market stalls and cypress trees, leading directly toward an imposing stone gate. Finally, the lighting shifts from bright sunlight to deep shadow as the character enters the massive arches, passing a prominent sphinx statue while heading toward a distant obelisk.
